## Funding Rate Reversal Patterns

*When funding rate goes extreme, price often reverses within 4-12 hours.*

**BTC after extreme POSITIVE funding (>0.05%):** avg 24h return +0.27%, dropped 46% of time (24 events)
**ETH after extreme POSITIVE funding (>0.05%):** avg 24h return -0.87%, dropped 64% of time (25 events)
**ETH after extreme NEGATIVE funding (<-0.03%):** avg 24h return -4.62%, bounced 0% of time (1 events)
**SOL after extreme POSITIVE funding (>0.05%):** avg 24h return +1.52%, dropped 44% of time (52 events)
**SOL after extreme NEGATIVE funding (<-0.03%):** avg 24h return +0.08%, bounced 45% of time (22 events)
**DOGE after extreme POSITIVE funding (>0.05%):** avg 24h return +1.39%, dropped 50% of time (50 events)


## Fear & Greed → BTC Performance

**Extreme Fear (0-20):** BTC avg 7d return +0.94%, positive 57% of time (224 events)
**Fear (20-40):** BTC avg 7d return +0.28%, positive 50% of time (614 events)
